title: 11 Herbal Creams For Mouth Ulcers
description: Aloe barbadensis creams contains a gel-like substance that has anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, making it effective in treating mouth ulcers. The cream contains compounds like vitamin E, aloe-emodin, and aloin, which have antimicrobial and antioxidant properties that help to reduce the pain and discomfort associated with mouth ulcers.
